title: Perception Exits Beta With Four Digital Asset Integrations
summary: Perception exited beta and launched its digital asset narrative intelligence platform with integrations from BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well, providing AI-driven market insights from over 1,000 curated industry sources.
body:
Perception, a digital asset narrative intelligence platform, has officially exited beta and launched its platform. The platform uses AI to analyze and provide insights from over 1,000 curated industry sources, helping users stay informed about market trends and developments.

The launch includes integrations with major crypto service providers such as BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well. These integrations allow users to access Perception's insights directly within their existing crypto management tools, streamlining the process of staying informed about market narratives.

This tool is particularly useful for everyday crypto users who want to make informed decisions without having to sift through countless articles and reports. By aggregating and analyzing data from a wide range of sources, Perception helps users understand the broader market context and potential opportunities.

Users of BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well can now access Perception's insights directly through their platforms. For those not using these services, keeping an eye on Perception's standalone offerings could be beneficial as the platform continues to expand its integrations and features.
twitterThread: Perception exited beta and launched its digital asset narrative intelligence platform, integrating with BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well. It analyzes 1,000+ curated industry sources for AI-driven market insights.
Perception uses AI to sift through 1,000+ industry sources, providing curated insights directly within your crypto management tools. No more endless reading!

If you use BitGo, Swan, Relai, or Bitcoin Well, check out Perception's insights. Otherwise, keep an eye on their standalone offerings. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-28-perception-launches-ai-powered-crypto-market-insights-platform
standaloneTweet: Perception exited beta with a digital asset narrative intelligence platform, offering AI-driven market insights from 1,000+ curated sources, integrated with BitGo, Swan, Relai, and Bitcoin Well.
